Obviously, there's a lot of reasons why a unit might leave a website, but that was the logic at that point.
We did an audit with some of the our biggest customers uh to see how long it takes a unit to sit in kind of this application phase before we can feel confident that it has converted to a lease.
What we found is that if a unit stays off a website for at least seven days, there is a 95% chance or higher that that unit has become a full lease.
If the unit leaves and then comes back within seven days, it is most likely due to a quick renovation, perhaps a paint job or a failed application that did not convert.
